meta.basis: SA only; BEA publishes no NSA monthly PCE price index. YoY computed on SA, BEA's published convention (confirmed with James 2026-07-20).
meta.weights: PUBLISHED nominal expenditure shares, BEA Table 2.8.5 — no roll-forward, no hardcoded relative-importance table.
meta.contributions: PUBLISHED, BEA Table 2.8.8 — not computed as weight x MoM. There is no weights layer in this pipeline.
